name: Proxy Execution via xWizard
description: Detects the execution of the `xWizard` tool with a CLSID argument, used to achieve proxy execution. Adversaries can bypass defenses by proxying the execution of malicious content via xWizard.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'xwizard.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the xwizard.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute xwizard.exe, including 'runwizard' and a CLSID.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which xwizard.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
